nsl_method.L1_1: symbol equivalence: different observations must decode to the same network symbol
nsl_method.L1_2: reverse prediction: if a symbol exists, the next observations should match its expected behavior
nsl_method.L1_3: disappearance: when the network condition disappears, the symbol must decode as false
nsl_method.L1_4: multi-round reproduction: the same symbol rules are tested across cycles

truth_boundary: L1 tests network-state language symbols. Local CPU still writes, samples, and decodes; network Raw/CDN supplies state, residual, release rhythm, and multi-view differences.
